questions.question: Explain the concept of virtualization in the context of cloud computing. How does it enable resource utilization and scalability? (3.2)
questions.hint: Describe the concept of virtualization, its benefits, and how it improves resource utilization and scalability in cloud computing

questions.question: Compare and contrast the types of virtualization technologies: hardware virtualization (e.g., VMware ESXi) and operating system-level virtualization (e.g., virtual machines). (3.3)
questions.hint: Describe the key differences between hardware virtualization and operating system-level virtualization

questions.question: What is the role of hypervisors in virtualization of clusters and data centers? Explain how they manage resources and ensure efficient utilization. (3.5)
questions.hint: Describe the role of hypervisors in managing resources and ensuring efficient utilization in virtualized clusters and data centers
